title: [Immersive Vehicles/MTS] City infrastructure pack
description: Various traffic lights, signs and poles.
body:
City infrastructure pack is a pack for [Immersive Vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles) (ex MTS) mod. So it requires this mod for operation.

![City infrastructure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2CDGLish/images/ff6773a2fb0c329b209418be05bec4671d83aabb.png)
It includes various traffic lights, road signs and poles with street lights.

![cip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e15ea1275a64453d47ebcf23953152876abae342.png)

Installation: drop a .jar file into a "mods" folder.

Two types of modern and old types of street lights will light up a street at night and with road signs and traffic lights will make roads more safe.

![street lights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2CDGLish/images/a102b3b3d40d862e3ad1a8ac0dcea7dcac2d7d0f.png)

Besides having regular car's and pedestrian's traffic lights this pack also includes three types of tram traffic lights so it can be used with my [Tram pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tram-pack-ir) for Immersive Railroading mod and others.

![controller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2CDGLish/images/14e5caae2e2752880f161ad9f02c8d2727803cd4.png)

A simple signal cotroller box is controlling all traffic lights on a road crossing.

![compability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2CDGLish/images/f804dc46258a2015ddf68beca019d6a3ea718aef.png)

It's also compatible with other Immersive Vehicles packs.

![frieeeeeends](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2CDGLish/images/431cd4f195339d2d7ae29e82d4230adc173acc9e.png)

This pack can be used on a server to play with friends.
The pack is often updated and supplemented by new types of road signs and other goods so stay 
tuned.

If you have any questions you can ask them on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/9jT7f4n2aT).
If you like my work, then you can support me with your donation! Thank you!
